subject: Physical Education
chapter: Physical Education and Sports for CWSN

remember: Students will be able to recall the importance of physical education and sports for children with special needs (CWSN)
Students will be able to define the term 'physical education and sports for CWSN' and its relevance
Students will be able to identify the benefits of physical education and sports for CWSN
understand: Students will be able to understand the concept of inclusivity in physical education and sports for CWSN
Students will be able to comprehend the role of physical education and sports in promoting physical and mental well-being of CWSN
Students will be able to appreciate the importance of adapting physical education and sports to meet the needs of CWSN
apply: Students will be able to design a physical education program for CWSN
Students will be able to apply sports equipment and technology to facilitate participation of CWSN
Students will be able to develop strategies for promoting physical activity among CWSN
analyze: Students will be able to analyze the social and cultural factors affecting participation of CWSN in physical education and sports
Students will be able to evaluate the effectiveness of different physical education programs for CWSN
Students will be able to compare and contrast different sports and physical activities suitable for CWSN

ncert_objectives: To understand the importance of physical education and sports for children with special needs (CWSN) and their role in promoting physical and mental well-being
To recognize the need for adapting physical education and sports to meet the needs of CWSN
To develop strategies for promoting physical activity among CWSN and enhancing their participation in physical education and sports
board_exam_objectives: Students will be able to explain the concept of physical education and sports for CWSN and its benefits
Students will be able to describe the adaptations made in physical education and sports to meet the needs of CWSN
Students will be able to discuss the social and cultural factors affecting participation of CWSN in physical education and sports
